title: Tubi 是第一个在 ChatGPT 中启动本机应用程序的主播
content: Tubi 成为首个在 ChatGPT 中提供应用程序集成的流媒体服务，ChatGPT 是数百万用户向其寻求答案的人工智能聊天机器人。
original_title: Tubi is the first streamer to launch a native app within ChatGPT
original_content: Tubi becomes the first streaming service to offer an app integration within ChatGPT, the AI chatbot that millions of users turn to for answers.

title: OpenAI 发布新的安全蓝图以解决儿童性剥削问题
content: OpenAI 的新儿童安全蓝图旨在解决与人工智能进步相关的儿童性剥削问题。
original_title: OpenAI releases a new safety blueprint to address the rise in child sexual exploitation
original_content: OpenAI's new Child Safety Blueprint aims to tackle the alarming rise in child sexual exploitation linked to advancements in AI.

title: Anthropic 在新的网络安全计划中首次推出强大的新人工智能模型 Mythos 预览
content: 新模式将被少数知名公司用来从事防御性网络安全工作。
original_title: Anthropic debuts preview of powerful new AI model Mythos in new cybersecurity initiative
original_content: The new model will be used by a small number of high-profile companies to engage in defensive cybersecurity work.

title: Atlassian 在 Confluence 中推出视觉 AI 工具和第三方代理
content: 除了与 Lovable、Replit 和 Gamma 合作的新第三方代理之外，Confluence 用户现在还可以在软件中创建视觉资产。
original_title: Atlassian launches visual AI tools and third-party agents in Confluence
original_content: Confluence users can now create visual assets within the software in addition to new third-party agents working with Lovable, Replit, and Gamma.

title: 谷歌悄然推出一款离线工作的人工智能听写应用
content: 谷歌新推出的离线优先听写应用程序使用 Gemma AI 模型来挑战 Wispr Flow 等应用程序。
original_title: Google quietly launched an AI dictation app that works offline
original_content: Google's new offline-first dictation app uses Gemma AI models to take on the apps like Wispr Flow.

title: OpenClaw 给用户带来了另一个对安全性感到恐惧的理由
content: 这种病毒式 AI 代理工具让攻击者能够悄悄地获得未经身份验证的管理员访问权限。
original_title: OpenClaw gives users yet another reason to be freaked out about security
original_content: The viral AI agentic tool let attackers silently gain admin unauthenticated access.
